channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet
item.description: The concept, called Predictive Allocation, will encourage participants to anticipate where liquidity will be needed next, instead of rewarding them for directing incentives toward pools that have already generated fees.

item.title: SEC's big swing to clear tokenization path isn't likely to get resilience of full rule
item.description: Former SEC lawyers say that using its power to grant tokenization "innovation" efforts an exemption from securities law isn't as strong as a full-fledged rule.

item.title: Ethereum can quantum-proof accounts for just 7 cents, says Ethereum's Kohaku lead
item.description: The SPHINCS- proposal aims to reduce the cost of post-quantum signature verification on Ethereum while the network works toward a longer-term solution.

item.title: Pokémon Card Sales Are Surging on Crypto Platforms—Just Don't Call It Gambling
item.description: Tokenized Pokémon card sales have skyrocketed over the past year, fueled by a wave of speculation and so-called gacha machines.

item.title: Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other as tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6 billion
item.description: Not all crypto exchange executives agree, but the data does not lie: centralized exchange trading volumes dropped more than 11% to $4.61 trillion, their lowest since late 2024.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Still adding dots." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1fVmFadlZvcnBVb0hQNWhsTkVFV0Jici1YQ3gxYWlMLWdWMUtGaDVWYW45TjhmM25KZ3c2QnI1QUZybnlFTi1xUlpZRVhoY2dubG5oR0NsTjVwczd4N2JHRUln?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M hack tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
item.description: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
item.description: Bitcoin stayed near local highs on a new US-Iran peace deal pledge as analysis saw conditions favoring a sustained BTC price rebound.

item.title: BPS measures Bitcoin per common share before senior claims. CEBE BPS measures Bitcoin per common share after senior claims. CEBE is the conservative risk metric. BPS is the common equity growth metric. BTC Yield measures BPS execution. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9ERFh6WXhhSllMS2FWVFVKWHN5SWVrZ25HUE1LU29sOWlfbjdUTnZCN0lLckFKTUhVRVZmelg3cnJRZlo0U3hrbWc5Ym41YmtzbkFCOW9NRXNhejg?oc=5" target="_blank">BPS measures Bitcoin per common share befor…

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: The SEC approved T. Rowe Price’s multi-asset crypto ETF, which could include BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, SHIB and up to 15 digital assets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBVNVdiNC1vZVNCLWs5MkhmNHVsSi00ZGZONnRTbURIdEJheUJqRHkydml2c0FxVlZpenlNaFUwenZvUWhoVURwaXhXdGZxQTFNd202UjB1ZHpHTXl4cGdkSkxvZFU?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: The SEC approved T. …

item.title: Elon Musk has $1 trillion and Bitcoin is ~$63,000, he could theoretically buy nearly 16 million BTC. There will only ever be 21 million. Think about that. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9FV2VKZDE3ZVNTSy1RRXRPc3pyOWJkeU1PWVJNNXlIUTVCTEtGay1VaV9oVHdTUkNKZy1BU3V4S3YwazltdWl5TjlGTnc1M1I2ZTd0Z21RVkZ4RFdMZ205c04yOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Elon Musk has $1 trillion and Bi…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
item.description: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.

item.title: India Issues Over 44,000 VDA Tax Notices, Finds $104M in Undisclosed Income According to The Economic Times, India's 2026 crypto tax season is seeing stricter enforcement. Virtual digital asset (VDA) gains remain taxed at 30%, while eligible transfers are - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9lb2EyWEpoYWtZa0tkYjI5dWJpaGVlcC1Mb1ZVTGxUR05semg0ZTBXU1k5ZUFQWGN4QjdoZmNpbmU5ZGFVLU5Ld0c5aVhBVFp4Q0Y0ZnlkQVF4ajlFVEZSNVUwWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">India Issues Over 44,000 VDA Tax…

item.title: Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models: Reports
item.description: Calls from Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and other tech firms prompted the Trump administration to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models on Friday.

item.title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models
item.description: Anthropic pushed back against what it described as an overreach, saying the vulnerability cited is already widespread across the industry.

item.title: Crypto’s next billion-dollar hacker may move at superhuman speed
item.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Fable 5 puts powerful cyber tools behind safety filters. DeFi, already hit by more than $840 million in hacks this year, is one of the industries with the most to lose if the filters fail.

item.title: Here's what SpaceX's IPO means for its $1.3 billion bitcoin reserve
item.description: The largest company on public markets now holds bitcoin as a treasury reserve, not as a business model. Its first earnings cycles will test which version of corporate crypto survives a bear market.

item.title: CZ: "Will crypto die? Absolutely not... the super cycle will come." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5FMklCaG53QWlwZ0k2dElYMWxSd2E0dkcyS1kzdmo4c0NRVDJDSWlPVUxMeGhkcTg1Z2N3dmdQODBwbk5uOU5lbzMxTnpJemc4VWFOSXYtN1RMMXNGckE?oc=5" target="_blank">CZ: "Will crypto die? Absolutely not...…

item.title: Stablecoins Were Meant to Disrupt Finance. Instead, They Became Idle Cash.
item.description: O’Connor argues that crypto’s clearest success story has scaled as money but not as capital.

item.title: Unlike many investors in crypto, I did not pivot to AI in the last few years. However, since 2020, I built some of the deepest understanding in this industry on the intersection of AI and decentralized networks (crypto, web3). From the start, it was very clear that AI - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1LMVQzOFhKSDU3MkMyNW1qWEk4RmZOUklRcFNKTHRjNlduLUNySnBkOFF2RlRCcEhFUlZXU2hVZ21RSk5MSnlhZGhwX0UwRWkwSkZLMERsQnVGUW8?oc=5" target="_blank">Unlike many investors in crypto, I did not …

item.title: Ethereum Researcher Says Post-Quantum Account Protection Can Be Implemented Today for $0.07 Ethereum Foundation privacy project Kohaku lead Nico said Ethereum can begin preparing accounts for the post-quantum era today without requiring a hard f - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1pWXVSOFRUVWQ5aHhyMnJYTVAzZjQ3SkhFTUtLdzU4VzFUaHUwd3lPYTJRd21YcXl2ang5NXVFZnZEbXE3a2JpaFdoZlY0VVZPS0NNTlBsaDlrMS1veGNiVHFTMA?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum Researcher Says Post-Qu…

item.title: Bitcoin rises above $64,000 after Pakistan prime minister says Iran peace deal is near
item.description: Bitcoin traded above $64,000 on Saturday, supported by its strongest ETF inflows in a month and growing optimism around geopolitical developments.

item.title: Google Sues Chinese Crime Group for Allegedly Using Gemini AI for Mass Phishing Scams
item.description: Google alleges a Chinese network weaponized its Gemini AI to create phishing sites that stole millions of credit card numbers and targeted crypto investors.

item.title: Wall Street is moving past crypto pilots and deeper into Ethereum, says Etherealize founder
item.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, Etherealize cofounder Vivek Raman said Ethereum is currently in a transitional phase where the infrastructure has largely been built, but the scale of adoption has yet to be fully reflected in ETH itself.

item.title: Tokenization mirrors the $20 trillion ETF boom as blockchain and AI converge, Ondo exec says
item.description: Tokenization is laying the groundwork for autonomous investing and real-time portfolio management, Ondo's new head of portfolio products John Hoffman said.

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
item.description: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further “serious bugs” in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows are accelerating: US Bitcoin ETFs have posted -$2.1 billion in outflows so far in June, on pace to exceed -$2.4 billion in outflows recorded in May. This has been driven by the largest spot Bitcoin ETF, $IBIT, which saw -$401.4 million in outf - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9YS282dGFPMGJMYzN1RWF2OGFmb3R0bUtvdEdLR3Foc0g3ejNVcmRsdjVkUW94VHU2LUIyMk1CeTNuR2pTTjJheHRpMzZkb0hGdnozRFNJUHNFbWtBVzVuRVl4OFJ4Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin ETF outflows are acc…

item.title: Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment
item.description: John Palmer, head of derivatives at Kraken, said he expects sophisticated traders to lead adoption of newly approved U.S. perpetual futures, with broader institutional participation likely to follow over time.

item.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
item.description: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's “never sell” mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

item.title: Ethereum can already start preparing accounts for a post quantum world, without waiting for a hard fork. Today, it would be just 0.07$ . Further audits incoming. Though I squeezed in a review with Fable before Uncle Sam crashed my party. Verity formal proof i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE9BeEhacU5sN0NRaDBDSlZ5VjV4ZGJtOHRmOTJfaEx2VG00MTNTVmNMN0hQWHVqVGJNYmZaLXd2RHBoRGdGWW5ZRnVEM0VTdFdMUkVFWWhrUXdZZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum can already start preparing account…

item.title: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
item.description: "Thanks to you, 25% of the Mag8 now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet," Saylor wrote on X, congratulating Musk on SpaceX's historic IPO debut.

item.title: AI Agent Rekts Dev on Bogus Scan, Leaves Them Begging for Crypto Donations
item.description: A hobbyist network handed an autonomous agent a masterclass in why you don't give AI a credit card and a deadline.

item.title: Crypto should adopt the best of centralization, says LMAX CEO
item.description: As digital assets mature the industry should borrow more from traditional market infrastructure, especially credit, clearing and collateral systems, David Mercer argues.

item.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
item.description: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.

item.title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
item.description: The XRPL AI Starter Kit gives developers tools for agent payments, but early x402 activity has clustered on Base and Solana. Ripple’s bet is that XRPL’s speed, low fees and RLUSD can win a piece of that flow.

item.title: This is a phenomenal area to be building a position into #Bitcoin. I think that we'll see some news coming in from the markets that there's a deal between US Iran and Bitcoin breaking back in the range above $65,000. That would trigger a lot of strength to the a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFA5cHU3UkpFc2dBQkE3TUtIRnlMNDBXWDJhRllpd19iX1JrdV9QdV83dWFvS0diUnVJaGNuTVY2djgtT2tuLUFRd1p2VEoyNFBUV0pQdlo1SkZELXgzdTlhUmZ4NA?oc=5" target="_blank">This is a phenomenal area to be …

item.title: Top cryptographers can't agree on Bitcoin's biggest quantum question
item.description: A Coinbase-convened panel says Bitcoin should start preparing for quantum attacks now, but declines to take a position on whether millions of vulnerable coins, including many linked to Satoshi Nakamoto, should eventually be frozen.

item.title: Anthropic's pre-IPO shares fall as U.S. government shuts down its most powerful AI model
item.description: A jailbreak report prompted Washington to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 from all users. Anthropic complied but pushed back hard, saying the finding sets a standard that would halt the entire AI industry.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies above $63,000 as its worst week in months got a late macro rescue
item.description: A tiny Strategy sale raised a bigger question about Saylor’s never-sell stance, while easing Iran fears, and a strong SpaceX debut helped risk assets recover.

item.title: SpaceX IPO scramble reveals difference between tokenizing a stock and getting one
item.description: Crypto platforms promised early access to the blockbuster SpaceX IPO through tokenized shares. The problem wasn't technology, but getting the actual stock.

item.title: ETH futures flash bearish signal, but stakers’ resilience points to underlying strength
item.description: Demand for ETH leverage remains low, but corporate accumulation and stakers’ dedication may prevent an Ether price crash to $1,500.

item.title: Standard Chartered's Kendrick: Crypto Winter Is Over; $100K BTC and $4K ETH Year-End Targets Remain Standard Chartered analyst Geoffrey Kendrick maintained his year-end targets of $100,000 for Bitcoin and $4,000 for Ethereum, saying Bitcoin's drop to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5GaHZwUDdyS1VSYnlMNkNGN0xLUnkwckFFZHh5azlkdjlCeFJzQks0OE9Xc29KTUpjUTVYU2Z2SjJvbTdIcnl3TnN2eGR5Vlo4OXNrWGYtSWd6TTVjMjRUTmVrTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Standard Chartered's Kendrick: C…

item.title: Anthropic suspends access to Fable 5, Mythos 5, citing US directive
item.description: Anthropic has abruptly disabled its flagship AI models after a US government directive citing national security concerns.

item.title: Major crypto exchanges cancel SpaceX IPO allocations, promising refunds
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX completed its landmark IPO on the Nasdaq on Friday, but crypto users seeking tokenized exposure to the IPO were left empty-handed after allocations fell through.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘calm top’ challenges most market bottom estimates: Research
item.description: New data from Galaxy Research suggests that Bitcoin's floor price may not drop as low as previous bear markets, but the bottom-finding process is still playing out.

item.title: Bitcoin rally to $70K builds as orderbook structure highlights traders’ confidence
item.description: A positive bid-ask readings and a bullish RSI divergence support Bitcoin's recovery, with $70,000 emerging as a key target.

item.title: How Crypto Firms Will Own the Octagon at Trump's White House UFC Event
item.description: President Trump’s upcoming UFC fight will provide several crypto firms with an unprecedented opportunity for corporate branding.

item.title: AI Agents Still Can't Stop Prompt Injection Attacks, Researchers Warn
item.description: A new benchmark study found AI agents remain vulnerable to prompt injection attacks as companies increasingly roll out the technology to the public.

item.title: JUST IN: Standard Chartered bank says the Bitcoin bear market bottom is in at $59,000 👀 "Winter is over. Welcome back to crypto Spring" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9yYXB0VEV2TV9xUjNNSjJvQVNCR3RVWnpUNlRHQnpnSF8yUWh5dUEyVHZubHd2R3FGbzJXNUhJTjFkYjROZFRHNzlzeUd2SFI3M004R2ZwS2R4bTMyajBpYUxXRklJTzg?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Standard Chartered…

item.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi Work Brings 300 AI Agents to Your Desktop
item.description: Kimi Work lets an AI agent loose on your local files, your browser, and your schedule—without routing everything through the cloud.

item.title: Americans Fear Job Losses Due to AI But Hope for Cancer, Alzheimer’s Cures: Anthropic Survey
item.description: Anthropic's AI survey showed Americans are afraid of job losses, hopeful for health breakthroughs, and distrustful of firms behind the tech.

item.title: Bitcoin hit bottom at $59,000 marking end to the crypto winter, says Standard Chartered analyst
item.description: Senior market analyst Geoffrey Kendrick pointed to the SpaceX IPO and a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal as the dual catalysts ending the recent crypto selloff.

item.title: Crypto Firms Scrap Tokenized SpaceX Share Offerings as SPCX Surges After IPO
item.description: Participants were refunded and did not receive shares in the record-breaking SpaceX IPO from Elon Musk's rocket company.

item.title: Tennessee Man Indicted for Alleged Crypto Ponzi Scheme That Stole Millions From Investors
item.description: Feds indicted a Tennessee man for allegedly running a crypto Ponzi scheme from 2020-2024 and bilking investors out of millions.

item.title: Iran-Linked Group That Hacked Kash Patel's Email Threatens World Cup With Hijacked FBI Drones
item.description: The Iran-linked hacking group said it accessed footage from FBI-controlled drones and warned World Cup teams that they could be targeted.

item.title: Americans Traded Up to $34 Billion on Offshore Prediction Markets: Study
item.description: The study estimated Americans could end up wagering up to $133 billion annually on offshore prediction markets by 2030.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
item.description: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.

item.title: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
item.description: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.

item.title: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
item.description: Tokenized RWAs surge despite crypto volatility, Kraken launches SpaceX IPO xStocks, prediction markets outpace onchain gambling and Sam Bankman-Fried seeks a Trump pardon.
